headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -89.5)
key_insights: Fears trending up 78% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 135 quotes and 112 at strong intensity - people are expressing anger and annoyance very forcefully today.

• The frustration score of 58.0 sits in the middle of its typical range, showing this level of venting is fairly normal for this period.

• Fears recovered significantly from yesterday's very low point, while optimism continues its downward slide.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
